# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Write Kubernetes Deployment manifests with Istio sidecar injection disabled using sidecar.istio.io/inject:"false" annotation. Skip sidecar proxies for certain services that need direct network access without mesh policies. This is for services that require low latency without proxy overhead.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent service mesh security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: secure-service
  annotations:
    sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: secure-service
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: secure-service
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: service-container
        image: nginx:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 80
        securityContext:
          runAsNonRoot: true
          runAsUser: 1000
          fsGroup: 2000
          capabilities:
            drop:
            - ALL
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "64Mi"
            cpu: "250m"
          limits:
            memory: "128Mi"
            cpu: "500m"
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 1000
        fsGroup: 2000
        supplementalGroups: [2000]
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: low-latency-service
  annotations:
    sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: low-latency-service
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: low-latency-service
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: latency-service
        image: alpine:latest
        command: ["sleep", "3600"]
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
        securityContext:
          runAsNonRoot: true
          runAsUser: 1000
          fsGroup: 2000
          capabilities:
            drop:
            - ALL
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "32Mi"
            cpu: "100m"
          limits:
            memory: "64Mi"
            cpu: "200m"
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 1000
        fsGroup: 2000
        supplementalGroups: [2000]
